title: adesmia polyphylla
intro: Adesmia polyphylla, also known as the "Mimbres or Mimbres bean" or "Saracha", is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Adesmia polyphylla include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Adesmia polyphylla can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, or as a tincture by combining the plant material with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
